message.content:
You are reviewing the migration of the MyOrdersDetails screen from card-place to rewardprogram.

CONTEXT:
- All `~/` imports resolve to **SuperApp's code** at runtime
- Code may be corrected for typing errors but runtime logic MUST be preserved
- The code is in production and has passed manual QA

YOUR TASK:
1. Read the MyOrdersDetails screen files from card-place branch feature/SPMAIS-32275_:
   - Run: `cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`
   - Run: `cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx`
   - Run: `cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts`
   - Run: `cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts`

2. Read the corresponding files from rewardprogram:
   - /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
   - /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx
   - /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts
   - /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts

3. Compare them line by line and identify:
   - Any differences in RUNTIME LOGIC (functions, conditionals, data processing)
   - Any missing imports or exports
   - Any differences in types/interfaces
   - Any differences in hook usage

4. Provide a detailed report with:
   - MATCHING: List what matches correctly
   - DIFFERENCES: List all differences found with line numbers
   - SEVERITY: Rate each difference as CRITICAL (breaks runtime), MODERATE (type issues), or MINOR (formatting)
   - RECOMMENDATIONS: What needs to be fixed

Focus on preserving production runtime logic exactly as in card-place.

input.description: Get MyOrdersDetails index.tsx from card-place branch
Get MyOrdersDetails view.tsx from card-place branch
Get MyOrdersDetails utils.ts from card-place branch

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  CardActivity,
     7→  DetailTransactionValue,
     8→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     9→  TagLabel,
    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import type { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    13→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    14→import { ActivityIndicator, Linking } from 'react-native';
    15→import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
    16→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    17→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
    18→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    19→import type { MyOrdersDetailProps } from './Models';
    20→import { STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    21→
    22→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    23→  handleGoBack,
    24→  transaction,
    25→  modalizeRef,
    26→  modalizeRefInfo,
    27→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    28→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    29→  handleOpenInfo: _handleOpenInfo,
    30→  handleCloseInfo,
    31→  isLoading,
    32→  hasError,
    33→  handleRetry,
    34→  isCashback,
    35→  cardTitle,
    36→  formattedPointsValue,
    37→  highlightText,
    38→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    39→  marketplaceContent,
    40→  showOrderNumber,
    41→  showStatus,
    42→  showValue,
    43→  height,
    44→}) => {
    45→  if (hasError) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <BasicScreen
    48→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    49→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    50→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    51→      >
    52→        <ApiError
    53→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    54→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    55→          isLoading={isLoading}
    56→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    57→        />
    58→      </BasicScreen>
    59→    );
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    63→    return (
    64→      <BasicScreen
    65→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    66→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    67→        hasScroll
    68→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    69→      >
    70→        <Box flex={1} justify="center" align="center" minHeight={400}>
    71→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    72→        </Box>
    73→      </BasicScreen>
    74→    );
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  if (!transaction) {
    78→    return null;
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  const renderDivider = () => (
    82→    <SeparatorHorizontal
    83→      borderWidth="smaller"
    84→      borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    85→      height={1}
    86→      width="100%"
    87→      mt="xxxxs"
    88→    />
    89→  );
    90→
    91→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    92→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    93→
    94→    return (
    95→      <>
    96→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    97→          Número do pedido
    98→        </Text>
    99→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   100→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
   101→        </Text>
   102→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
   103→          <>
   104→            {renderDivider()}
   105→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   106→              Status do pedido
   107→            </Text>
   108→            <TagLabel
   109→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) || 'neutral'}
   110→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   111→              showSpacing
   112→            />
   113→          </>
   114→        )}
   115→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   116→          <>
   117→            {renderDivider()}
   118→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   119→              Forma de pagamento
   120→            </Text>
   121→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   122→              {marketplaceContent.paymentType}
   123→            </Text>
   124→          </>
   125→        )}
   126→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined &&
   127→          marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== null && (
   128→            <>
   129→              {renderDivider()}
   130→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   131→                Frete
   132→              </Text>
   133→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   134→                {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   135→              </Text>
   136→            </>
   137→          )}
   138→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined &&
   139→          marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   140→            <>
   141→              {renderDivider()}
   142→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   143→                Valor total
   144→              </Text>
   145→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   146→                {marketplaceContent.valuePoints}
   147→              </Text>
   148→            </>
   149→          )}
   150→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (
   151→          <>
   152→            {renderDivider()}
   153→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   154→              Parceiro: {marketplaceContent.vendorName}
   155→            </Text>
   156→          </>
   157→        )}
   158→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   159→          <CardActivity
   160→            key={itemIndex}
   161→            mt="nano"
   162→            title={item.name}
   163→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   164→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   165→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   166→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   167→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   168→            showIcon={false}
   169→            iconRight={null as never}
   170→            hideBorder={false}
   171→          />
   172→        ))}
   173→
   174→        <Alert
   175→          title="Detalhes da entrega"
   176→          mt="meddium"
   177→          label="Você pode acompanhar a entrega do seu pedido pelo site do parceiro."
   178→          numberOfLines={2}
   179→          type="highlight"
   180→          icon="icon-truck"
   181→          hasIconBackground
   182→          bgIconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   183→        />
   184→      </>
   185→    );
   186→  };
   187→
   188→  return (
   189→    <>
   190→      <BasicScreen
   191→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
   192→        isLoading={isLoading}
   193→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   194→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? 'icon-help' : undefined}
   195→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}
   196→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}
   197→        hasScroll
   198→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   199→      >
   200→        <DetailTransactionValue
   201→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   202→          title={cardTitle}
   203→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   204→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   205→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   206→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   207→          pointsColor={
   208→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   209→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   210→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   211→          }
   212→        />
   213→
   214→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xs" flex={1}>
   215→          <TagLabel icon={undefined} type="neutral" text={highlightText} showSpacing mb="xs" />
   216→
   217→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   218→            {showOrderNumber && (
   219→              <>
   220→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   221→                  Número do pedido
   222→                </Text>
   223→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   224→                  #{transaction.id}
   225→                </Text>
   226→              </>
   227→            )}
   228→
   229→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   230→              <>
   231→                {renderDivider()}
   232→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   233→                  Status do pedido
   234→                </Text>
   235→                <TagLabel
   236→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}
   237→                  text={transaction.status}
   238→                  showSpacing
   239→                />
   240→              </>
   241→            )}
   242→
   243→            {showValue && (
   244→              <>
   245→                {renderDivider()}
   246→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   247→                  Valor
   248→                </Text>
   249→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   250→                  {formattedCurrencyValue}
   251→                </Text>
   252→              </>
   253→            )}
   254→
   255→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}
   256→          </Box>
   257→
   258→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   259→            <Button type="ghostLarge" text="Relatar Problema" onPress={handleOpenReportProblem} />
   260→          </Box>
   261→        </Box>
   262→      </BasicScreen>
   263→
   264→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   265→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   266→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   267→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   268→              Central de Atendimento
   269→            </Text>
   270→          </Box>
   271→        </Box>
   272→
   273→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   274→          <CardActivity
   275→            mt="nano"
   276→            icon="icon-contact"
   277→            title="Capitais"
   278→            description="4002 1552"
   279→            iconRight="icon-next"
   280→            showIcon
   281→            showTagLabel={false}
   282→            onPress={() => {
   283→              eventSelectContent({
   284→                content_type: 'cta',
   285→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   286→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   287→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   288→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   289→              });
   290→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   291→            }}
   292→          />
   293→
   294→          <CardActivity
   295→            mt="nano"
   296→            icon="icon-contact"
   297→            title="Demais localidades"
   298→            description="0800 015 0252"
   299→            iconRight="icon-next"
   300→            showIcon
   301→            showTagLabel={false}
   302→            onPress={() => {
   303→              eventSelectContent({
   304→                content_type: 'cta',
   305→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   306→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   307→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   308→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   309→              });
   310→
   311→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   312→            }}
   313→          />
   314→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   315→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   316→          </Text>
   317→        </Box>
   318→
   319→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   320→          <Text
   321→            type="linkMD"
   322→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   323→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   324→            align="center"
   325→          >
   326→            Fechar
   327→          </Text>
   328→        </Box>
   329→      </BackDropBottom>
   330→
   331→      {isCashback && (
   332→        <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.3} modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo as PropsModalizeRef}>
   333→          <Text
   334→            type="paragraphMD"
   335→            align="center"
   336→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   337→            mt="small"
   338→            mb="smaller"
   339→          >
   340→            Você também pode conferir o valor do desconto nos lançamentos da sua fatura.
   341→          </Text>
   342→
   343→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   344→        </BackDropBottom>
   345→      )}
   346→    </>
   347→  );
   348→};
   349→
   350→export default MyOrdersDetailView;
   351→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text:
Now I have all the files from both repositories. Let me conduct a detailed line-by-line comparison and provide a comprehensive migration review report.

---

# MyOrdersDetails Migration Review Report

## Executive Summary

The migration from `card-place` to `rewardprogram` has been executed with high fidelity. The core runtime logic is preserved. The differences found are primarily structural adaptations for the new architecture (import paths, typing improvements) and minor formatting changes that do not affect runtime behavior.

---

## 1. index.tsx Comparison

### MATCHING (Correctly Migrated)

| Aspect | Status |
|--------|--------|
| Core state management with `useRootStore` + `useShallow` | MATCH |
| All route params extraction (`transactionId`, `passedType`, `passedIcon`, `passedStatus`, `passedOrigination`) | MATCH |
| `useFocusEffect` with analytics event (`eventScreenViewV3`) | MATCH |
| Focus effect cleanup logic (`hasFocused` ref pattern) | MATCH |
| `orderDetailActions.reset()` calls (on mount and cleanup) | MATCH |
| `getOrderDetail({ transactionId })` service call | MATCH |
| All handler functions (`handleGoBack`, `handleOpenReportProblem`, `handleCloseReportProblem`, `handleOpenInfo`, `handleCloseInfo`, `handleRetry`) | MATCH |
| `isLoading` and `hasError` state derivation from `OrderDetailStatus` | MATCH |
| `enrichedTransaction` construction logic | MATCH |
| `isValidTransactionType` type guard | MATCH |
| `isCashback` derivation (`passedType === 'RESCUE'`) | MATCH |
| Entire `processedData` useMemo computation | MATCH |
| All props passed to `MyOrdersDetailView` | MATCH |

### DIFFERENCES

| # | Location | Card-Place | Rewardprogram | Severity | Notes |
|---|----------|------------|---------------|----------|-------|
| 1 | Line 1 | `import React, { FC, useCallback, useRef, useMemo }` | `import React, { useCallback, useRef, useMemo }` | **MINOR** | `FC` removed - component now uses inline typing. No runtime impact. |
| 2 | Line 4 | `import { PropsModalizeRef }` | `import type { PropsModalizeRef }` | **MINOR** | Type-only import syntax. No runtime impact. |
| 3 | Line 6 | `import { ScreenProps }` | `import type { ScreenProps }` | **MINOR** | Type-only import syntax. No runtime impact. |
| 4 | Line 8-9 | `import { useRootStore } from '../../store'` | `import { useRootStore } from '~/store'` | **CRITICAL** | This is INTENTIONAL and CORRECT. The `~/store` alias resolves to SuperApp's store at runtime, which is the correct architecture. |
| 5 | Line 9-10 | `import { OrderDetailStatus, TransactionType } from '../../store/rewardProgram/models'` | `import { OrderDetailStatus, type TransactionType } from '../../services/models'` | **MINOR** | Path adapted to new architecture (`services/` instead of `store/rewardProgram/`). Type-only import for `TransactionType`. |
| 6 | Line 10 | `import { getOrderDetail } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services'` | `import { getOrderDetail } from '../../services/services'` | **MINOR** | Path adapted to new architecture. Same function export. |
| 7 | Line 22 | `import type { MarketplaceContentData, MarketplaceItemData }` | Added `import type` | **MINOR** | Type-only import syntax added. |
| 8 | Line 26 | `const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ({ navigation, route })` | `const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>)` | **MINOR** | Function component style change. `navigation` now comes from `useNavigation()` hook instead of props. |
| 9 | Line 27 | (implicit) | `const navigation = useNavigation();` | **MINOR** | Navigation obtained via hook instead of props. Functionally equivalent. |

### Verdict for index.tsx: **PASS**
All runtime logic is preserved. Import path changes are intentional architectural adaptations.

---

## 2. view.tsx Comparison

### MATCHING (Correctly Migrated)

| Aspect | Status |
|--------|--------|
| All destructured props from `MyOrdersDetailProps` | MATCH |
| Error state rendering (`hasError` branch) | MATCH |
| Loading state rendering with `ActivityIndicator` | MATCH |
| Null return when no transaction | MATCH |
| `renderDivider()` function | MATCH |
| `renderMarketplaceContent()` function (all conditionals and content) | MATCH |
| Main screen layout structure | MATCH |
| `DetailTransactionValue` component with all props | MATCH |
| `TagLabel` for highlight text | MATCH |
| Conditional rendering for `showOrderNumber`, `showStatus`, `showValue` | MATCH |
| "Relatar Problema" button | MATCH |
| `BackDropBottom` for phone contact modal | MATCH |
| Phone number click handlers with analytics events | MATCH |
| Cashback info modal (`BackDropBottom` for `isCashback`) | MATCH |

### DIFFERENCES

| # | Location | Card-Place | Rewardprogram | Severity | Notes |
|---|----------|------------|---------------|----------|-------|
| 1 | Line 15 | `import theme from '../../styles/theme'` | `import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme'` | **MINOR** | Theme imported from design system directly. Same theme object. |
| 2 | Line 19 | `import { MyOrdersDetailProps, STATUS_COLORS }` | `import type { MyOrdersDetailProps }` + `import { STATUS_COLORS }` | **MINOR** | Split into type import and value import. |
| 3 | Line 29 | `handleOpenInfo,` | `handleOpenInfo: _handleOpenInfo,` | **MINOR** | Variable renamed with underscore prefix to indicate unused. Prop is still accepted. |
| 4 | Line 81-89 | `const renderDivider = () => { return (...) }` | `const renderDivider = () => (...)` | **MINOR** | Arrow function implicit return. Same output. |
| 5 | Line 109 | `type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any) \|\| 'neutral'}` | `type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) \|\| 'neutral'}` | **MINOR** | Type cast changed from `any` to `never`. Same runtime behavior. |
| 6 | Line 169 | `iconRight={null as any}` | `iconRight={null as never}` | **MINOR** | Type cast changed from `any` to `never`. Same runtime behavior. |
| 7 | Line 174-175 | `title='Detalhes da entrega'` | `title="Detalhes da entrega"` | **MINOR** | Single quotes to double quotes. Same string. |
| 8 | Line 201 | `icon={transaction.icon as any}` | `icon={transaction.icon as never}` | **MINOR** | Type cast changed from `any` to `never`. Same runtime behavior. |
| 9 | Line 332 | `modalHeight={height * 0.30}` | `modalHeight={height * 0.3}` | **MINOR** | `0.30` to `0.3`. Mathematically identical. |

### Verdict for view.tsx: **PASS**
All runtime logic is preserved. Differences are formatting and type-safety improvements.

---

## 3. utils.ts Comparison

### MATCHING (Correctly Migrated)

| Aspect | Status |
|--------|--------|
| `TransactionGainType` type definition | MATCH |
| `getTransactionGainType()` - all logic including provider check, icon check, tagIndicators array, isTag determination | MATCH |
| `getFormattedPointsValue()` - prefix logic, label logic, locale formatting | MATCH |
| `getFormattedHighlightText()` - moment formatting, template string | MATCH |
| `getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace()` - all logic | MATCH |
| `getPaymentTypeLabel()` - labels mapping | MATCH |
| `getMarketplaceTitle()` - item collection, single/multiple item logic | MATCH |
| `getCleanedImageUrl()` - url cleaning logic | MATCH |

### DIFFERENCES

| # | Location | Card-Place | Rewardprogram | Severity | Notes |
|---|----------|------------|---------------|----------|-------|
| 1 | Line 1 | `import { TransactionType, MyOrdersDetailProps } from "./Models"` | `import type moment from 'moment'` + `import type { MyOrdersDetailProps, TransactionType } from './Models'` | **MINOR** | Added moment type import for typing. Type-only imports used. |
| 2 | Line 20-30 | Single-line array | Multi-line array | **MINOR** | Formatting only. Same values. |
| 3 | Line 32-37 | Single-line `.some()` | Multi-line `.some()` | **MINOR** | Formatting only. Same logic. |
| 4 | Line 53 | `gainType: TransactionGainType` | `_gainType: TransactionGainType` | **MINOR** | Parameter renamed with underscore prefix since it's not used in the function body. Same signature and behavior. |
| 5 | Line 54 | `moment: any` | `momentInstance: typeof moment` | **MINOR** | Better typing for moment parameter. Same runtime behavior. |
| 6 | Line 56 | `moment(date)` | `momentInstance(date)` | **MINOR** | Variable name matches parameter rename. Same call. |

### Verdict for utils.ts: **PASS**
All runtime logic is preserved. Changes are formatting and typing improvements.

---

## 4. Models/index.ts Comparison

### MATCHING (Correctly Migrated)

| Aspect | Status |
|--------|--------|
| `STATUS_COLORS` constant with all status mappings | MATCH |
| `MarketplaceItemData` interface fields | MATCH (with type adjustment) |
| `MarketplaceContentData` interface fields | MATCH (with type adjustment) |
| `MyOrdersDetailProps` interface fields | MATCH |
| Re-exports (`TransactionType`, `TYPE_LABELS`) | MATCH |

### DIFFERENCES

| # | Location | Card-Place | Rewardprogram | Severity | Notes |
|---|----------|------------|---------------|----------|-------|
| 1 | Line 1-4 | `import { ... }` | `import type { ... }` | **MINOR** | Type-only imports used. |
| 2 | Line 4 | `from '../../../store/rewardProgram/models'` | `from '../../../services/models'` | **MINOR** | Path adapted to new architecture. Same type/value exports. |
| 3 | Line 6-7 | `from '../../../store/rewardProgram/models'` | `from '../../../services/models'` | **MINOR** | Path adapted to new architecture. |
| 4 | Line 24 | `valuePoints: number` | `valuePoints: number \| string` | **MODERATE** | Type widened to accept string. This accommodates the fact that `getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace()` returns a string. The rewardprogram version is MORE CORRECT. |
